## Related Issues

## Architecture Compliance Checklist (Required)
- [ ] Config-first: no new hardcoded business rules (or ADR linked)
- [ ] Module boundaries respected (`api`/`batch`/`loader`/`utils`)
- [ ] Dependency direction respected
- [ ] New module dependency edges listed below and validated against rulebook
- [ ] Config contract version impact documented
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered and tested
- [ ] Observability requirements met (correlation ID + required metrics)
- [ ] Failure semantics documented (retries/terminal states)
- [ ] Any architecture exception has ADR link + expiry/removal criteria

### Dependency Edge Changes (if any)
- None / list here

## Test Evidence
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Compatibility tests (if config contract changed)
- [ ] Resilience/performance evidence (if applicable)
